channel.title: NKSCoder Blog — Nitesh Kumar Singh
channel.description: NKSCoder blog by Nitesh Kumar Singh (NKS Coder, NKS AI) — AI developer, Python coder. Ollama AI, LLM guides, Django fintech & backend case studies at nkscoder.in.

item.title: NBFC Bank Statement Analysis with FastAPI & LangGraph
item.description: NBFC platform case study — multi-bank parsing, LangGraph AI pipeline, Hinglish chat, bulk upload, and credit assessment PDF reports.

item.title: Prompt Engineering in Simple Words
item.description: Learn prompt engineering in easy language with practical examples to get better AI answers for writing and coding.

item.title: What Is an LLM? A Simple Guide for Beginners
item.description: Large Language Models explained in plain English — how ChatGPT-style AI works and its limits.

item.title: What Is Ollama? Run AI on Your Own Computer
item.description: Run Llama and other open-source AI models locally with Ollama — private and no API bills.

item.title: How AI Reads PDF Documents
item.description: Text extraction, OCR, chunking, and LLM analysis — how AI understands PDFs step by step.

item.title: When Should You Use AI in Your Project?
item.description: Good vs bad AI use cases and a practical checklist for adding AI to software projects.

item.title: What Is Ray's Role in LLM Pipelines?
item.description: How Ray enables distributed preprocessing, batch LLM inference orchestration, and GPU worker scaling with Ollama, Django, and Celery.

item.title: Building AI Bank Statement Analysis with Ollama on NVIDIA GPU
item.description: How we built a production bank statement analysis platform at Airtel Payments Bank using Ollama, NVIDIA GPU, Django, Celery, and Ray.

item.title: Django Backend Architecture for Fintech at Scale
item.description: REST API design, PostgreSQL patterns, and background job architecture for financial platforms — lessons from 12+ years in fintech.

item.title: Scaling Python Workers with Celery, RabbitMQ, and Ray
item.description: Distributed processing patterns for high-volume PDF and CSV ingestion in banking and enterprise systems.
